text.Outra aba assumiu o painel: Another tab took over the dashboard
text.Uma nova aba do Song Request Linux foi a: A new Song Request Linux tab was opened and became active. To avoid duplicate commands, this tab is on standby.
text.Salve a configuração antes de trocar de: Save settings before changing screens, closing the app, or starting the stream.
text.Fila, player, eventos e conexões em uma: Queue, player, events, and connections on one screen.
text.Siga os passos em ordem. Preencha, conec: Follow the steps in order. Fill in the fields, connect accounts, and click Save.
text.Spotify, YouTube via Pear ou YouTube via: Spotify, YouTube via Pear, or YouTube via OBS Browser.
text.Twitch: ligar o bot ao chat: Twitch: connect the bot to chat
text.Use a conta do bot aqui. Ela vai ler o c: Use the bot account here. It reads chat and responds to commands.
text.Obrigatório se o provider padrão for Spo: Required when Spotify is the active mode. Requires Premium and Spotify open on the stream PC.
text.Tocar playlist fallback quando não houve: Play fallback playlist when there are no requests
text.Escolha onde o YouTube vai tocar: OBS Br: Choose where YouTube plays: OBS Browser Source or Pear Desktop.
text.Pear Desktop ou Browser Source OBS. Use: Pear Desktop or OBS Browser Source. Use only one mode at a time.
text.adicione a URL acima como Browser Source: add the URL above as a Browser Source, enable
text.e, nas propriedades avancadas de audio,: and, in Advanced Audio Properties, use
Volume is controlled in the OBS mixer.
and keep the Pear API saved in Setup.
text.Aceitar vídeo fora da categoria Música: Accept videos outside the Music category
text.Escolha se a fila deve continuar depois: Choose whether the queue continues after the stream ends and the app opens again.
text.Continuar com a fila salva quando o app: Restore saved queue when the app opens again
Adds a song to the queue.
text.Sem número mostra o volume. Com número m: Without a number, shows volume. With a number, changes volume.
text.Escolha Spotify, Pear ou OBS Browser. Us: Choose Spotify, Pear, or OBS Browser. Use one provider at a time.
text.Controlar audio via OBS + Monitorar e en: Control audio via OBS + Monitor and Output
text.Ative o plugin API Server na porta 26538: Enable the API Server plugin on port 26538.
text.Song Request Linux encerrando: Song Request Linux is shutting down
text.Busca, fila, volume e fallback pelo Spot: Search, queue, volume, and fallback through Spotify.
text.Busca pelo SRL e playback no Pear Deskto: Search through SRL and playback in Pear Desktop.
text.Busca pelo SRL e playback no Browser Sou: Search through SRL and playback in Browser Source.
text.Escolha um modo por live: Spotify, YouTu: Choose one mode per stream: Spotify, YouTube/Pear, or YouTube/OBS Browser.
text.Persistência: não informada nesta respos: Persistence: not reported in this response.
text.a fila atual não será restaurada ao reab: the current queue will not be restored when reopening the app.
text.bot Twitch sem configuracao ativa: Twitch bot has no active configuration
